categories.name: Analytics
categories.title: Collect, process, and analyze data at any scale

services.name: Amazon Athena
services.description: An interactive query service that makes it easy to analyze data in Amazon S3 using standard SQL. Athena is serverless, so there is no infrastructure to manage, and you pay only for the queries that you run.

services.name: Amazon CloudSearch
services.description: A managed service in the AWS Cloud that makes it simple and cost-effective to set up, manage, and scale a search solution for your website or application.

services.name: Amazon DataZone
services.description: A data management service that you can use to publish data and make it available to the business data catalog through your personalized web application.

services.name: Amazon EMR
services.description: The industry-leading cloud big data platform for processing vast amounts of data using open source tools such as Apache Spark, Apache Hive, Apache HBase, Apache Flink, Apache Hudi, and Presto.

services.name: Amazon FinSpace
services.description: A data management and analytics service purpose-built for the financial services industry (FSI). Reduces the time you spend finding and preparing petabytes of financial data.

services.name: Amazon Kinesis
services.description: Makes it easy to collect, process, and analyze real-time, streaming data so you can get timely insights and react quickly to new information.

services.name: Amazon Data Firehose
services.description: The easiest way to reliably load streaming data into data stores and analytics tools. It can capture, transform, and load streaming data into Amazon S3, Amazon Redshift, Amazon OpenSearch Service, and Splunk.

services.name: Amazon Managed Service for Apache Flink
services.description: The easiest way to analyze streaming data, gain actionable insights, and respond to your business and customer needs in real time.

services.name: Amazon Kinesis Data Streams
services.description: A massively scalable and durable real-time data streaming service. Kinesis Data Streams can continuously capture gigabytes of data per second from hundreds of thousands of sources.

services.name: Amazon Kinesis Video Streams
services.description: Makes it easy to securely stream video from connected devices to AWS for analytics, ML, playback, and other processing.

services.name: Amazon OpenSearch Service
services.description: Makes it easy to deploy, secure, operate, and scale OpenSearch to search, analyze, and visualize data in real-time.

services.name: Amazon OpenSearch Serverless
services.description: A serverless option in Amazon OpenSearch Service. Run petabyte-scale workloads without configuring, managing, and scaling OpenSearch clusters.

services.name: Amazon Redshift
services.description: The most widely used cloud data warehouse. Makes it fast, simple, and cost-effective to analyze all your data using standard SQL and your existing Business Intelligence (BI) tools.

services.name: Amazon Redshift Serverless
services.description: Makes it easier to run and scale analytics without having to manage your data warehouse infrastructure.

services.name: Amazon QuickSight
services.description: A fast, cloud-powered business intelligence (BI) service that makes it easy for you to deliver insights to everyone in your organization.

services.name: AWS Clean Rooms
services.description: Helps companies and their partners more easily and securely analyze and collaborate on their collective datasets without sharing or copying one another's underlying data.

services.name: AWS Data Exchange
services.description: Makes it easy to find, subscribe to, and use third-party data in the cloud.

services.name: AWS Data Pipeline
services.description: A web service that helps you reliably process and move data between different AWS compute and storage services, as well as on-premises data sources, at specified intervals.

services.name: AWS Entity Resolution
services.description: A service that helps you match and link related records stored across multiple applications, channels, and data stores without building a custom solution.

services.name: AWS Glue
services.description: A fully managed extract, transform, and load (ETL) service that makes it easy for customers to prepare and load their data for analytics.

services.name: AWS Lake Formation
services.description: A service that makes it easy to set up a secure data lake in days. A data lake is a centralized, curated, and secured repository that stores all your data.

services.name: Amazon Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka (Amazon MSK)
services.description: A fully managed service that makes it easy for you to build and run applications that use Apache Kafka to process streaming data.

categories.name: Application Integration
categories.title: Decouple and integrate microservices, distributed systems, and serverless applications

services.name: AWS Step Functions
services.description: A serverless orchestration service that lets you combine AWS Lambda functions and other AWS services to build business-critical applications.

services.name: Amazon AppFlow
services.description: A fully managed integration service that enables you to securely transfer data between SaaS applications and AWS services.

services.name: AWS B2B Data Interchange
services.description: An AWS service for automating the transformation of EDI documents into common data representations such as JSON and XML.

services.name: Amazon EventBridge
services.description: A serverless event bus service that makes it easy to connect your applications with data from a variety of sources.

services.name: Amazon Managed Workflows for Apache Airflow (MWAA)
services.description: A managed orchestration service for Apache Airflow that makes it easier to set up and operate end-to-end data pipelines in the cloud.

services.name: Amazon MQ
services.description: A managed message broker service for Apache ActiveMQ and RabbitMQ that makes it easy to set up and operate message brokers in the cloud.

services.name: Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)
services.description: A fully managed messaging service for both application-to-application (A2A) and application-to-person (A2P) communication.

services.name: Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS)
services.description: A fully managed message queuing service that enables you to decouple and scale microservices, distributed systems, and serverless applications.

services.name: Amazon Simple Workflow Service (Amazon SWF)
services.description: Helps developers build, run, and scale background jobs that have parallel or sequential steps.

categories.name: Blockchain
categories.title: Build and manage scalable blockchain networks

services.name: Amazon Managed Blockchain
services.description: A fully managed service that makes it easy to create and manage scalable blockchain networks using the popular open source frameworks Hyperledger Fabric and Ethereum.

categories.name: Business Applications
categories.title: Run business operations in the cloud with productivity and collaboration applications

services.name: AWS AppFabric
services.description: A no-code service that connects SaaS applications across your organization, so IT and security teams can easily manage and secure applications using a standard schema.

services.name: Amazon Chime
services.description: A communications service that lets you meet, chat, and place business calls inside and outside your organization, all using a single application.

services.name: Amazon Chime SDK
services.description: A set of real-time communications components that developers can use to quickly add messaging, audio, video, and screen sharing capabilities to their applications.

services.name: Amazon Connect
services.description: An easy-to-use omnichannel cloud contact center that helps you provide superior customer service at a lower cost.

services.name: Amazon Pinpoint
services.description: A flexible and scalable outbound and inbound marketing communications service.

services.name: Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES)
services.description: A cloud-based email sending service designed to help digital marketers and application developers send marketing, notification, and transactional emails.

services.name: Amazon WorkDocs
services.description: A fully managed, secure content creation, storage, and collaboration service.

services.name: Amazon WorkMail
services.description: A secure, managed business email and calendaring service with support for existing desktop and mobile email clients.

categories.name: Cloud Financial Management
categories.title: Optimize your AWS spend with financial management tools

services.name: AWS Billing Conductor
services.description: A custom billing service that supports the showback and chargeback workflows of AWS Solution Providers and Enterprise customers.

services.name: AWS Cost Explorer
services.description: A tool that enables you to view and analyze your costs and usage. You can explore your usage and costs using the main graph, the Cost Explorer cost and usage reports, or the Cost Explorer RI reports.

services.name: AWS Budgets
services.description: Lets you set custom budgets that alert you when your costs or usage exceed (or are forecasted to exceed) your budgeted amount.

services.name: AWS Cost and Usage Report
services.description: A single location for accessing comprehensive information about your AWS costs and usage.

services.name: Reserved Instance (RI) Reporting
services.description: Provides a number of RI-specific cost management solutions out-of-the-box to help you better understand and manage your RIs.

services.name: Savings Plans
services.description: A flexible pricing model that provides savings on AWS usage, offering lower prices compared to On-Demand pricing.

categories.name: Compute
categories.title: Power your applications with scalable computing capacity

services.name: Amazon EC2
services.description: A web service that provides secure, resizable compute capacity in the cloud. It is designed to make web-scale cloud computing easier for developers.

services.name: Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling
services.description: Helps you maintain application availability and allows you to automatically add or remove EC2 instances according to conditions you define.

services.name: Amazon EC2 Image Builder
services.description: Simplifies the building, testing, and deployment of Virtual Machine and container images for use on AWS or on-premises.

services.name: Amazon Lightsail
services.description: Designed to be the easiest way to launch and manage a virtual private server with AWS. Lightsail plans include everything you need to jumpstart your project.

services.name: Amazon Linux 2023
services.description: A Linux-based operating system for AWS that is designed to provide a secure, stable, and high-performance execution environment for cloud applications.

services.name: AWS App Runner
services.description: A fully managed service that makes it easy for developers to quickly deploy containerized web applications and APIs, at scale.

services.name: AWS Batch
services.description: Enables developers, scientists, and engineers to easily and efficiently run hundreds of thousands of batch computing jobs on AWS.

services.name: AWS Elastic Beanstalk
services.description: An easy-to-use service for deploying and scaling web applications and services developed with Java, .NET, PHP, Node.js, Python, Ruby, Go, and Docker.

services.name: AWS Fargate
services.description: A compute engine for Amazon ECS that allows you to run containers without having to manage servers or clusters.

services.name: AWS Lambda
services.description: Lets you run code without provisioning or managing servers. You pay only for the compute time you consume.

services.name: AWS Serverless Application Repository
services.description: Enables you to quickly deploy code samples, components, and complete applications for common use cases such as web and mobile backends.

services.name: AWS Outposts
services.description: Brings native AWS services, infrastructure, and operating models to virtually any data center, co-location space, or on-premises facility.

services.name: AWS Wavelength
services.description: Delivers ultra-low latency applications for 5G devices by embedding AWS compute and storage services within 5G networks.

services.name: VMware Cloud on AWS
services.description: An integrated cloud offering jointly developed by AWS and VMware delivering a highly scalable, secure and innovative service.

categories.name: Containers
categories.title: Run and manage containers at scale

services.name: Amazon Elastic Container Registry (Amazon ECR)
services.description: A fully managed Docker container registry that makes it easy for developers to store, manage, and deploy Docker container images.

services.name: Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)
services.description: A highly scalable, high-performance container orchestration service that supports Docker containers and allows you to easily run and scale containerized applications on AWS.

services.name: Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS)
services.description: A managed service that makes it easy for you to run Kubernetes on AWS without needing to stand up or maintain your own Kubernetes control plane.

services.name: AWS App2Container
services.description: A command-line tool for modernizing .NET and Java applications into containerized applications.

services.name: Red Hat OpenShift Service on AWS
services.description: A managed service that provides an enterprise-ready Kubernetes container platform built on Red Hat OpenShift.

categories.name: Customer Enablement
categories.title: Get expert guidance and managed services for your AWS environment

services.name: AWS Managed Services
services.description: Provides ongoing management of your AWS infrastructure so you can focus on your applications. Helps to reduce your operational overhead and risk.

services.name: AWS re:Post
services.description: A private version of AWS re:Post for enterprises with Enterprise Support or Enterprise On-Ramp Support plans, providing access to knowledge and experts to accelerate cloud adoption.

categories.name: Databases
categories.title: Purpose-built databases for every application need

services.name: Amazon Aurora
services.description: A MySQL and PostgreSQL-compatible relational database built for the cloud, that combines the performance and availability of traditional enterprise databases with the simplicity and cost-effectiveness of open source databases.

services.name: Amazon DynamoDB
services.description: A key-value and document database that delivers single-digit millisecond performance at any scale.

services.name: Amazon ElastiCache
services.description: A web service that makes it easy to deploy, operate, and scale an in-memory cache in the cloud.

services.name: Amazon Keyspaces (for Apache Cassandra)
services.description: A scalable, highly available, and managed Apache Cassandra–compatible database service.

services.name: Amazon MemoryDB
services.description: A Redis-compatible, durable, in-memory database service that delivers ultra-fast performance.

services.name: Amazon Neptune
services.description: A fast, reliable, fully managed graph database service that makes it easy to build and run applications that work with highly connected datasets.

services.name: Amazon Relational Database Service (Amazon RDS)
services.description: Makes it easy to set up, operate, and scale a relational database in the cloud. It provides cost-efficient and resizable capacity while automating time-consuming administration tasks.

services.name: Amazon RDS for Db2
services.description: Makes it easy to set up, operate, and scale Db2 deployments in the cloud.

services.name: Amazon RDS on VMware
services.description: Lets you deploy managed databases in on-premises VMware environments using Amazon RDS technology.

services.name: Amazon Timestream
services.description: A fast, scalable, and serverless time series database service for IoT and operational applications that makes it easy to store and analyze trillions of events per day.

services.name: Amazon DocumentDB (with MongoDB compatibility)
services.description: A fast, scalable, highly available, and fully managed document database service that supports MongoDB workloads.

services.name: Amazon Lightsail Managed Databases
services.description: Lightsail managed databases are instances dedicated to running databases, with managed maintenance and security for your database and its underlying infrastructure.

categories.name: Developer Tools
categories.title: Build, test, and deploy your code with integrated developer tools

services.name: AWS Infrastructure Composer
services.description: A visual tool that helps you create and modify AWS infrastructure configurations.

services.name: AWS Cloud9
services.description: A cloud-based integrated development environment (IDE) that lets you write, run, and debug your code with just a browser.

services.name: AWS CloudShell
services.description: A browser-based shell that makes it easy to securely manage, explore, and interact with your AWS resources.

services.name: AWS CodeArtifact
services.description: A fully managed artifact repository service that makes it easy for organizations to securely store, publish, and share software packages.

services.name: AWS CodeBuild
services.description: A fully managed continuous integration service that compiles source code, runs tests, and produces software packages that are ready to deploy.

services.name: Amazon CodeCatalyst
services.description: A unified software development service for development teams to quickly build, deliver, and scale applications on AWS.

services.name: AWS CodeCommit
services.description: A fully managed source control service that hosts secure Git-based repositories.

services.name: AWS CodeDeploy
services.description: A fully managed deployment service that automates software deployments to a variety of compute services such as Amazon EC2, AWS Fargate, AWS Lambda, and on-premises servers.

services.name: AWS CodePipeline
services.description: A fully managed continuous delivery service that helps you automate your release pipelines for fast and reliable application and infrastructure updates.

services.name: Amazon Corretto
services.description: A no-cost, multiplatform, production-ready distribution of the Open Java Development Kit (OpenJDK).

services.name: AWS Fault Injection Service
services.description: A fully managed service for running fault injection experiments on AWS that makes it easier to improve an application's performance, observability, and resiliency.

services.name: Amazon Q Developer
services.description: A generative AI–powered assistant for software development that helps you understand, build, extend, and operate AWS applications.

services.name: AWS X-Ray
services.description: Helps developers analyze and debug production, distributed applications, such as those built using a microservices architecture.

categories.name: End User Computing
categories.title: Securely access desktops and applications from anywhere

services.name: Amazon WorkSpaces
services.description: A managed, secure Desktop-as-a-Service (DaaS) solution. You can use Amazon WorkSpaces to provision either Windows or Linux desktops.

services.name: Amazon WorkSpaces Web
services.description: Makes it easy for customers to safely provide their employees with access to internal websites and SaaS web applications without the administrative burden of appliances or specialized client software.

categories.name: Front-End Web and Mobile
categories.title: Build full-stack web and mobile applications faster

services.name: AWS Amplify
services.description: A set of tools and services that enables mobile and front-end web developers to build secure, scalable full-stack applications.

services.name: AWS AppSync
services.description: A serverless GraphQL and Pub/Sub API service that simplifies building modern web and mobile applications.

services.name: AWS Device Farm
services.description: An application testing service that lets you improve the quality of your web and mobile apps by testing them across an extensive range of desktop browsers and real mobile devices.

services.name: Amazon Location Service
services.description: Makes it easy for developers to add location functionality to applications without compromising data security and user privacy.

categories.name: Game Tech
categories.title: Build, deploy, and scale dedicated game servers

services.name: Amazon GameLift Servers
services.description: A managed service for deploying, operating, and scaling dedicated game servers for session-based multiplayer games.

categories.name: Internet of Things (IoT)
categories.title: Connect devices to the cloud and build IoT solutions

services.name: AWS IoT Analytics
services.description: A fully managed service that makes it easy to run and operationalize sophisticated analytics on massive volumes of IoT data.

services.name: AWS IoT Button
services.description: A programmable button based on the Amazon Dash Button hardware. This simple Wi-Fi device is easy to configure and designed for developers to get started.

services.name: AWS IoT Core
services.description: Lets you connect IoT devices to the AWS cloud without the need to provision or manage servers.

services.name: AWS IoT Device Defender
services.description: A fully managed service that helps you secure your fleet of IoT devices by continuously auditing IoT configurations and detecting anomalies.

services.name: AWS IoT Device Management
services.description: Makes it easy to securely register, organize, monitor, and remotely manage IoT devices at scale.

services.name: AWS IoT Events
services.description: A fully managed service that makes it easy to detect and respond to events from IoT sensors and applications.

services.name: AWS IoT ExpressLink
services.description: Powers a range of hardware modules developed and offered by AWS Partners to help quickly transform any embedded device into an IoT-connected device.

services.name: AWS IoT FleetWise
services.description: A managed service that you can use to collect, transform, and transfer vehicle data to the cloud in near-real time.

services.name: AWS IoT Greengrass
services.description: An open source IoT edge runtime and cloud service that helps you build, deploy, and manage IoT applications on your devices.

services.name: AWS IoT SiteWise
services.description: A managed service that makes it easy to collect, store, organize, and monitor data from industrial equipment at scale.

services.name: AWS IoT TwinMaker
services.description: Makes it easier to create digital twins of real-world systems such as buildings, factories, industrial equipment, and production lines.

services.name: AWS Partner Device Catalog
services.description: Helps you find devices and hardware to help you explore, build, and go to market with your IoT solutions.

services.name: FreeRTOS
services.description: An open source, real-time operating system for microcontrollers that makes small, low-power edge devices easy to program, deploy, secure, connect, and manage.

categories.name: Machine Learning (ML) and Artificial Intelligence (AI)
categories.title: Build intelligent applications with machine learning and AI services

services.name: Amazon Augmented AI (Amazon A2I)
services.description: A service that makes it easy to build the workflows required for human review of ML predictions.

services.name: Amazon Bedrock
services.description: A fully managed service that makes high-performing foundation models (FMs) from leading AI startups and Amazon available for your use through a unified API.

services.name: Amazon CodeGuru
services.description: A developer tool that provides intelligent recommendations to improve code quality and identify an application's most expensive lines of code.

services.name: Amazon Comprehend
services.description: A natural language processing (NLP) service that uses machine learning to find insights and relationships in text.

services.name: Amazon DevOps Guru
services.description: A ML-powered service that makes it easy to improve an application's operational performance and availability.

services.name: Amazon Forecast
services.description: A fully managed service that uses machine learning to deliver highly accurate forecasts.

services.name: Amazon Fraud Detector
services.description: A fully managed service that makes it easy to identify potentially fraudulent online activities such as online payment fraud and fake account creation.

services.name: Amazon Comprehend Medical
services.description: A HIPAA-eligible NLP service that uses machine learning to extract health data from medical text—no machine learning experience required.

services.name: Amazon Kendra
services.description: An intelligent search service powered by machine learning. Kendra reimagines enterprise search for your websites and applications.

services.name: Amazon Lex
services.description: A service for building conversational interfaces into any application using voice and text.

services.name: Amazon Lookout for Equipment
services.description: Uses data from sensors on your equipment to automatically train a ML model for your equipment and uses it to detect abnormal equipment behavior—no ML expertise required.

services.name: Amazon Lookout for Metrics
services.description: Uses machine learning to automatically detect and diagnose anomalies in business and operational data.

services.name: Amazon Lookout for Vision
services.description: A machine learning service that spots defects and anomalies in visual representations using computer vision.

services.name: Amazon Monitron
services.description: An end-to-end system that uses machine learning to detect abnormal conditions in industrial equipment and enable predictive maintenance.

services.name: Amazon PartyRock
services.description: A fun and intuitive hands-on, generative AI app-building playground powered by Amazon Bedrock.

services.name: Amazon Personalize
services.description: A machine learning service that makes it easy for developers to create individualized recommendations for customers using their applications.

services.name: Amazon Polly
services.description: A service that turns text into lifelike speech, allowing you to create applications that talk and build entirely new categories of speech-enabled products.

services.name: Amazon Q
services.description: A generative AI-powered assistant for accelerating software development and leveraging companies' internal data.

services.name: Amazon Rekognition
services.description: Makes it easy to add image and video analysis to your applications using proven, highly scalable, deep learning technology.

services.name: Amazon SageMaker AI
services.description: A fully managed service that provides every developer and data scientist with the ability to build, train, and deploy machine learning models quickly.

services.name: Amazon Textract
services.description: A service that automatically extracts text and data from scanned documents, going beyond simple OCR to also identify the contents of fields in forms and information stored in tables.

services.name: Amazon Transcribe
services.description: An automatic speech recognition (ASR) service that makes it easy for developers to add speech-to-text capability to their applications.

services.name: Amazon Translate
services.description: A neural machine translation service that delivers fast, high-quality, and affordable language translation.

services.name: AWS DeepComposer
services.description: The world's first ML-enabled musical keyboard that allows developers to get hands-on with generative AI.

services.name: AWS DeepRacer
services.description: A 1/18th scale race car that gives you an interesting and fun way to get started with reinforcement learning (RL).

services.name: AWS HealthLake
services.description: A HIPAA-eligible service offering a complete view of individual or patient population health data for query and analytics at scale.

services.name: AWS HealthScribe
services.description: A HIPAA-eligible service that empowers healthcare software vendors to build clinical applications that automatically generate clinical notes by analyzing patient-clinician conversations.

services.name: AWS Panorama
services.description: A machine learning appliance and SDK that allows organizations to bring computer vision to on-premises cameras to make predictions locally.

categories.name: Management and Governance
categories.title: Manage and govern your AWS environment at scale

services.name: AWS Auto Scaling
services.description: Monitors your applications and automatically adjusts capacity to maintain steady, predictable performance at the lowest possible cost.

services.name: AWS CloudFormation
services.description: Gives developers and systems administrators an easy way to create and manage a collection of related AWS resources, provisioning and updating them in an orderly and predictable fashion.

services.name: AWS CloudTrail
services.description: A service that enables governance, compliance, operational auditing, and risk auditing of your AWS account.

services.name: Amazon CloudWatch
services.description: A monitoring and management service that provides data and actionable insights for AWS, hybrid, and on-premises applications and infrastructure resources.

services.name: AWS Compute Optimizer
services.description: A service that recommends optimal AWS resources for your workloads to reduce costs and improve performance.

services.name: AWS Console Mobile Application
services.description: Lets you view and manage a select set of resources to support incident response while on-the-go.

services.name: AWS Control Tower
services.description: A service for organizations with multiple accounts and teams who are looking for the easiest way to set up their new multi-account AWS environment and govern at scale.

services.name: AWS Config
services.description: A service that enables you to assess, audit, and evaluate the configurations of your AWS resources.

services.name: AWS Health
services.description: Provides ongoing visibility into your resource performance and the availability of your AWS services and accounts.

services.name: AWS Launch Wizard
services.description: A service that guides you through the sizing, configuration, and deployment of third-party applications on AWS.

services.name: AWS License Manager
services.description: Makes it easy to manage licenses from software vendors across AWS and on-premises environments.

services.name: Amazon Managed Grafana
services.description: A fully managed service for open source Grafana developed in collaboration with Grafana Labs.

services.name: Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus
services.description: A serverless, Prometheus-compatible monitoring service for container metrics that makes it easier to securely monitor container environments at scale.

services.name: AWS Organizations
services.description: Helps you centrally govern your environment as you grow and scale your workloads on AWS.

services.name: AWS OpsWorks
services.description: A configuration management service that provides managed instances of Chef and Puppet.

services.name: AWS Proton
services.description: A fully managed delivery service for deploying container and serverless applications.

services.name: Amazon Q Developer in Chat Applications
services.description: An interactive agent that helps you monitor, troubleshoot, and operate your AWS infrastructure from your chat channels.

services.name: AWS Service Catalog
services.description: Allows organizations to create and manage catalogs of IT services that are approved for use on AWS.

services.name: AWS Systems Manager
services.description: Gives you visibility and control of your infrastructure on AWS. It provides a unified user interface so you can view operational data from multiple AWS services.

services.name: AWS Trusted Advisor
services.description: An online tool that provides you real-time guidance to help you provision your resources following AWS best practices.

services.name: AWS User Notifications
services.description: A service that enables you to centrally set up and view notifications from AWS services.

services.name: AWS Well-Architected Tool
services.description: Helps you review the state of your workloads and compare them to the latest AWS architectural best practices.

categories.name: Media
categories.title: Process, store, and deliver media content

services.name: Amazon Elastic Transcoder
services.description: Media transcoding in the cloud. Designed to be a highly scalable, easy-to-use, and cost-effective way for developers to convert media files.

services.name: Amazon Interactive Video Service (Amazon IVS)
services.description: A managed live streaming solution that makes it easy to create interactive video experiences.

services.name: Amazon Nimble Studio
services.description: A virtual studio that empowers visual effects, animation, and interactive content teams to create content securely within a scalable, private cloud service.

services.name: AWS Elemental Appliances and Software
services.description: Solutions for on-premises video processing and delivery.

services.name: AWS Elemental MediaConnect
services.description: A high-quality transport service for live video that is reliable, secure, and flexible.

services.name: AWS Elemental MediaConvert
services.description: A file-based video transcoding service with broadcast-grade features that enables you to create video-on-demand (VOD) content for broadcast and multiscreen delivery at scale.

services.name: AWS Elemental MediaLive
services.description: A broadcast-grade live video processing service that creates high-quality video streams for delivery to broadcast televisions and internet-connected multiscreen devices.

services.name: AWS Elemental MediaPackage
services.description: Reliably prepares and protects your video for delivery over the Internet.

services.name: AWS Elemental MediaStore
services.description: An AWS storage service optimized for media that gives you the performance, consistency, and low latency required to deliver live streaming video content.

services.name: AWS Elemental MediaTailor
services.description: Lets you serve targeted ads to viewers while maintaining broadcast quality in over-the-top (OTT) video applications.

categories.name: Migration and Transfer
categories.title: Migrate and transfer workloads to AWS

services.name: AWS Application Discovery Service
services.description: Helps enterprise customers plan migration projects by gathering information about their on-premises data centers.

services.name: AWS Application Migration Service
services.description: A highly automated lift-and-shift solution that simplifies, expedites, and reduces the cost of migrating applications to AWS.

services.name: AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS)
services.description: Helps you migrate databases to AWS quickly and securely. The source database remains fully operational during the migration.

services.name: AWS Mainframe Modernization Service
services.description: A set of managed tools providing infrastructure and software for migrating, modernizing, and running mainframe applications.

services.name: AWS Migration Hub
services.description: Provides a single place to discover your existing servers, plan migrations, and track the status of each application migration.

services.name: AWS Snow Family
services.description: A collection of physical devices and capacity points that help migrate large amounts of data into and out of the cloud.

services.name: AWS DataSync
services.description: A data transfer service that makes it easy for you to automate moving data between on-premises storage and AWS services.

services.name: AWS Transfer Family
services.description: A fully managed service that enables the transfer of files over SFTP, FTPS, FTP, and AS2 directly into and out of Amazon S3 or Amazon EFS.

categories.name: Networking and Content Delivery
categories.title: Run your network and deliver content with global infrastructure

services.name: Amazon API Gateway
services.description: A fully managed service that makes it easy for developers to create, publish, maintain, monitor, and secure APIs at any scale.

services.name: AWS App Mesh
services.description: A service mesh that makes it easy to monitor and control microservices running on AWS.

services.name: Amazon CloudFront
services.description: A fast content delivery network (CDN) service that securely delivers data, videos, applications, and APIs to customers globally with low latency, high transfer speeds.

services.name: AWS Cloud Map
services.description: A cloud resource discovery service that lets you define custom names for your application resources, and it maintains the updated location of these dynamically changing resources.

services.name: AWS Direct Connect
services.description: Makes it easy to establish a dedicated network connection from your premises to AWS.

services.name: Elastic Load Balancing
services.description: Automatically distributes incoming application traffic across multiple targets, such as Amazon EC2 instances, containers, and IP addresses.

services.name: AWS Global Accelerator
services.description: A networking service that improves the availability and performance of the applications you offer to your global users.

services.name: Integrated Private Wireless on AWS
services.description: Helps you deploy and manage your own private mobile network on-premises through a simplified procurement process.

services.name: AWS PrivateLink
services.description: Provides private connectivity between VPCs, AWS services, and your on-premises networks, without exposing your traffic to the public internet.

services.name: AWS Private 5G
services.description: Makes it easy to deploy, manage, and scale your own private mobile network, with all required hardware and software provided by AWS.

services.name: Amazon Route 53
services.description: A highly available and scalable cloud Domain Name System (DNS) web service designed to give developers and businesses an extremely reliable and cost-effective way to route end users to Internet applications.

services.name: AWS Transit Gateway
services.description: A service that enables customers to connect their Amazon Virtual Private Clouds (VPCs) and their on-premises networks to a single gateway.

services.name: AWS Verified Access
services.description: Provides secure access to corporate applications without a VPN, based on security policies using identity and device posture signals.

services.name: Amazon VPC
services.description: Lets you provision a logically isolated section of the AWS Cloud where you can launch AWS resources in a virtual network that you define.

services.name: Amazon VPC Lattice
services.description: A fully managed application networking service that you use to connect, secure, and monitor all of your services across multiple accounts and virtual private clouds.

services.name: AWS Site-to-Site VPN
services.description: Creates a secure connection between your data center or branch office and your AWS cloud resources.

categories.name: Quantum Technologies
categories.title: Explore and build quantum computing solutions

services.name: Amazon Braket
services.description: A fully managed quantum computing service that helps researchers and developers get started with the technology to accelerate research and discovery.

categories.name: Satellite
categories.title: Control satellite communications and process satellite data

services.name: AWS Ground Station
services.description: A fully managed service that lets you control satellite communications, downlink and process satellite data, and scale your satellite operations.

categories.name: Security, Identity, and Compliance
categories.title: Protect your data, accounts, and workloads with comprehensive security services

services.name: Amazon Cognito
services.description: Lets you add user sign-up, sign-in, and access control to your web and mobile apps quickly and easily.

services.name: Amazon Detective
services.description: Makes it easy to analyze, investigate, and quickly identify the root cause of potential security issues or suspicious activities.

services.name: Amazon GuardDuty
services.description: A threat detection service that continuously monitors for malicious activity and unauthorized behavior to protect your AWS accounts, workloads, and data.

services.name: Amazon Inspector
services.description: An automated security assessment service that helps improve the security and compliance of applications deployed on AWS.

services.name: Amazon Macie
services.description: A fully managed data security and data privacy service that uses machine learning and pattern matching to discover and protect your sensitive data in AWS.

services.name: Amazon Security Lake
services.description: Automatically centralizes security data from cloud and on-premises sources into a purpose-built data lake stored in your AWS account.

services.name: Amazon Verified Permissions
services.description: A scalable permissions management and fine-grained authorization service for the applications that you build.

services.name: AWS Artifact
services.description: A central resource for compliance-related information. It provides on-demand access to AWS security and compliance reports.

services.name: AWS Audit Manager
services.description: Helps you continuously audit your AWS usage to simplify how you assess risk and compliance with regulations and industry standards.

services.name: AWS Certificate Manager
services.description: Lets you easily provision, manage, and deploy public and private SSL/TLS certificates for use with AWS services and your internal connected resources.

services.name: AWS CloudHSM
services.description: A cloud-based hardware security module (HSM) that enables you to easily generate and use your own encryption keys on the AWS Cloud.

services.name: AWS Directory Service
services.description: Enables your directory-aware workloads and AWS resources to use managed Active Directory in the AWS Cloud.

services.name: AWS Firewall Manager
services.description: A security management service that allows you to centrally configure and manage firewall rules across your accounts and applications.

services.name: AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)
services.description: Enables you to manage access to AWS services and resources securely. You can create and manage AWS users and groups, and use permissions to allow and deny their access.

services.name: AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS)
services.description: Makes it easy for you to create and manage cryptographic keys and control their use across a wide range of AWS services and in your applications.

services.name: AWS Network Firewall
services.description: A managed service that makes it easy to deploy essential network protections for all of your Amazon VPCs.

services.name: AWS Resource Access Manager
services.description: Helps you securely share your resources across AWS accounts or within your AWS Organization.

services.name: AWS Secrets Manager
services.description: Helps you protect access to your applications, services, and IT resources without the upfront cost and complexity associated with deploying and managing a secrets infrastructure.

services.name: AWS Security Hub CSPM
services.description: Gives you a comprehensive view of your security state in AWS and helps you check your compliance with the security industry standards and best practices.

services.name: AWS Shield
services.description: A managed Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) protection service that safeguards applications running on AWS.

services.name: AWS IAM Identity Center
services.description: The place where you create, or connect, your workforce users once and centrally manage their access to multiple AWS accounts and applications.

services.name: AWS WAF
services.description: A web application firewall that helps protect your web applications or APIs against common web exploits that may affect availability, compromise security, or consume excessive resources.

categories.name: Storage
categories.title: Durable, scalable, and secure storage for your data

services.name: AWS Backup
services.description: A fully managed backup service that makes it easy to centralize and automate the backup of data across AWS services.

services.name: Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS)
services.description: An easy-to-use, high-performance, block-storage service designed for use with Amazon EC2 for both throughput and transaction intensive workloads at any scale.

services.name: AWS Elastic Disaster Recovery
services.description: Minimizes downtime and data loss with fast, reliable recovery of on-premises and cloud-based applications using affordable storage, minimal compute, and point-in-time recovery.

services.name: Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS)
services.description: A simple, scalable, fully managed elastic NFS file system for use with AWS Cloud services and on-premises resources.

services.name: Amazon File Cache
services.description: A fully managed, high-speed cache on AWS that makes it easier to process file data, regardless of where the data is stored.

services.name: Amazon FSx for Lustre
services.description: A fully managed file system that is optimized for compute-intensive workloads, such as high-performance computing, machine learning, and media data processing workflows.

services.name: Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP
services.description: A fully managed service that provides highly reliable, scalable, high-performing, and feature-rich file storage built on NetApp's popular ONTAP file system.

services.name: Amazon FSx for OpenZFS
services.description: A fully managed file storage service that makes it easy to move data to AWS from on-premises ZFS or other Linux-based file servers.

services.name: Amazon FSx for Windows File Server
services.description: A fully managed, highly reliable, and scalable file storage accessible over the industry-standard Server Message Block (SMB) protocol.

services.name: Amazon Simple Storage Service (Amazon S3)
services.description: An object storage service that offers industry-leading scalability, data availability, security, and performance.

services.name: AWS Storage Gateway
services.description: A hybrid cloud storage service that gives you on-premises access to virtually unlimited cloud storage.
